snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: UI Design independently verified the exact frozen Development hash and made no edits. It reviewed real safe replacements, final-only citations, Enter and IME handling, durable Dataset reopen, layout, accessibility and cancellation behavior against the assembled evidence.

dimensions.summary: Home keeps one provisional answer in the existing conversation surface, replaces it with the durable final, and retains the same composer, citation and Dataset navigation lifecycle.
Pi, API, Prompt, Job, UI, quality and performance owners agree on two answer-only draft sources, authoritative final data, IME-safe submission and same-turn Dataset continuation.
Seven exact selectors bind safe fallback rejection, Enter submission, Dataset continuation and restart, durable table reopen, and assembled worker composition only to existing partial rows.
The batch closes adjacent Public Alpha continuity defects while preserving one Pi-owned ingress, final schema and citation authority, durable recovery and existing provider and platform boundaries.
Nine existing Owner sections and the acceptance projection absorb the observable and recovery delta; no new document, prototype, dependency, schema, setting or status is introduced.

verification.evidence: The exact Public Alpha continuity candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/pi-agent-runtime-adapter.test.ts tests/unit/home-agent-conversation-ui.test.ts tests/unit/unified-agent-ingress.test.ts tests/unit/bundled-worker-availability.test.ts
verification.evidence: All contract gates and negative fixtures pass; exact selectors prove answer-only progressive replacement, fail-closed presentation fallback, IME-safe Enter, one-turn Dataset continuation/restart and assembled worker availability.
Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,159 claims; seven exact evidence additions project only to existing partial rows, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the bounded Owner and evidence projection, without a new governed document, prototype refresh or unrelated contract expansion.

coordination.taskTitle: Public Alpha safe Home streaming, Enter submission and durable continuity
coordination.compatibility: The candidate preserves the terminal Home schema and durable final as authority. It adds safe progressive presentation, IME-safe Enter, same-parent Dataset continuation and missing-runtime recovery repairs without a dependency, durable schema, provider, permission or phase change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze one exact combined candidate after assembled Electron and packaged evidence. UI Design accepted the exact hash; Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and existing partial acceptance rows before one semantic and snapshot bind.

nonBlockingRisks: Real progressive timing is proved with an OpenAI Responses-compatible loopback; Chat Completions and Anthropic Messages retain adapter regressions without new live-provider timing evidence.
The presentation fallback may use one extra provider turn and fails closed when exact answer reproduction cannot produce usable safe replacements.
Package proof remains unsigned local macOS arm64; Windows, signed and notarized macOS, and live-provider platform matrices remain open.
New assembled GUI evidence covers TXT, Markdown and CSV; PDF, Office and image paths retain their existing parser and OCR smoke boundaries.
